parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When enabled, the will connect to the specified device and send points to it.

parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Specify the type of laser device.

parameters.name: device
parameters.label: Device
parameters.description: Menu to select the named devices in the case of Helios and ShowNET.

parameters.name: scan
parameters.label: Scan
parameters.description: Scan for Helios devices. there should not be any active Helios device connections when this scan is performed, otherwise they will be closed by the scanning process.

parameters.name: netaddress
parameters.label: Network Address
parameters.description: The network address of the EtherDream device to send the packets to. EtherDream IP can be found be polling devices on the network using the .

parameters.name: port
parameters.label: Network Port
parameters.description: The port to send the EtherDream packets to.

parameters.name: localaddress
parameters.label: Local Address
parameters.description: Specify an IP address to send from. This is useful when the system has multiple NICs (Network Interface Card) and you want to select which one to use.

parameters.name: queuetime
parameters.label: Queue Time
parameters.description: Determines the queue size of the Helios/EtherDream point buffer and the corresponding time required to drain it. It is often useful to reduce this value when sending fewer points.

parameters.name: queueunits
parameters.label: Queue Units
parameters.description: The units of queue time.

parameters.name: xscale
parameters.label: X Scale
parameters.description: Allows the input x values to be scaled by the specified factor.

parameters.name: yscale
parameters.label: Y Scale
parameters.description: Allows the input y values to be scaled by the specified factor.

parameters.name: redscale
parameters.label: Red Scale
parameters.description: Allows the input r values to be scaled by the specified factor.

parameters.name: greenscale
parameters.label: Green Scale
parameters.description: Allows the input g values to be scaled by the specified factor.

parameters.name: bluescale
parameters.label: Blue Scale
parameters.description: Allows the input b values to be scaled by the specified factor.

parameters.name: intensityscale
parameters.label: Intensity Scale
parameters.description: Allows the input intensity values (i) to be scaled by the specified factor.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
